room.caption: [G5-2N] The suit is designed for temperature and environmental VARIAtions!

instance.creationCode:
sprite_index=sVariaPickup image_speed=0.33 soundToPlay=global.snd_MetItemGet stringToShow="You have obtained the Varia Suit!" fadingTime=60 boxSize=1
if global.gameProgress>=2855 instance_destroy()
